com.newland.nsdk.core.api.external.cardemulator

Interface ExtCardEmulator

  • All Superinterfaces:
    Module

    public interface ExtCardEmulator
extends Module

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      void finish()
      Ends the performing card emulator procedure.
      EmulateConfig getConfig(EmulateCardType cardType)
      Gets the target emulated card configurations.
      byte[] getEvent(EmulateEventType eventType)
      Gets the related event status.
      EmulateCardStatus getStatus(EmulateCardType cardType)
      Gets the emulated card status.
      void init()
      Initializes the card emulator mode.
      byte[] readData(EmulateFileType fileType, int readLength)
      Reads data from the target emulated card file with expected read length.
      void setConfig(EmulateCardType cardType, EmulateConfig config)
      Sets the emulated card configurations, like UID and memory size.
      void start(EmulateCardType cardType)
      Starts the card emulator procedure.
      void writeData(EmulateFileType fileType, byte[] data)
      Writes data into the target emulated card file.

    • Method Detail

      • init

        void init()
   throws NSDKException
        Initializes the card emulator mode.
        Throws:
        NSDKException

      • start

        void start(EmulateCardType cardType)
    throws NSDKException
        Starts the card emulator procedure. After starting successfully, the device will emulate to be a card, which can be identified by the external device.
        Parameters:
        cardType - [Required] The card type to be emulated as.
        Throws:
        NSDKException

      • getStatus

        EmulateCardStatus getStatus(EmulateCardType cardType)
                     throws NSDKException
        Gets the emulated card status.
        Parameters:
        cardType - [Required] The emulated card type.
        Returns:
        The status of the emulated card.
        Throws:
        NSDKException

      • setConfig

        void setConfig(EmulateCardType cardType,
               EmulateConfig config)
        throws NSDKException
        Sets the emulated card configurations, like UID and memory size.
        Parameters:
        cardType - [Required] The emulated card type, see EmulateCardType.
        config - [Required] The configuration information to be set to the emulated card file, see EmulateConfig
        Throws:
        NSDKException

      • writeData

        void writeData(EmulateFileType fileType,
               byte[] data)
        throws NSDKException
        Writes data into the target emulated card file.
        Parameters:
        fileType - [Required] The target file, see EmulateFileType.
        data - [Required] The data to be written to the target file.
        Throws:
        NSDKException

      • readData

        byte[] readData(EmulateFileType fileType,
                int readLength)
         throws NSDKException
        Reads data from the target emulated card file with expected read length.
        Parameters:
        fileType - [Required] The target file, see EmulateFileType.
        readLength - [Required] The expected read length.
        Returns:
        The data with expected length from the target file.
        Throws:
        NSDKException

      • getConfig

        EmulateConfig getConfig(EmulateCardType cardType)
                 throws NSDKException
        Gets the target emulated card configurations.
        Parameters:
        cardType - [Required] The target emulated card type, see EmulateCardType.
        Returns:
        The configurations from the target card.
        Throws:
        NSDKException

      • finish

        void finish()
     throws NSDKException
        Ends the performing card emulator procedure. After this, device will switch back to the reader mode.
        Throws:
        NSDKException

      • getEvent

        byte[] getEvent(EmulateEventType eventType)
         throws NSDKException
        Gets the related event status.
        Parameters:
        eventType - [Required] The related event to be checked status.
        Returns:
        The status of the related event.
        Throws:
        NSDKException
